title: Design WhatsApp
description: Design a messaging application that supports one-to-one chats, group chats, media messages, delivery receipts, and offline delivery. The system should provide low-latency messaging while preserving privacy and reliability across devices.
constraints: Deliver messages reliably to online and offline users.
Support group chats, media attachments, and delivery or read receipts.
Protect message privacy and minimize retained sensitive data.
